task_description: Three improvements to the Anime Guide Engine: (1) Fix content rendering to output proper HTML with Tailwind instead of raw markdown, (2) Expand filler data to 100+ anime with a scraping script, (3) Expand seed to 5000+ anime with resumable batch processing.

verification.summary: TypeScript compiles clean (npx tsc --noEmit passes). Lint passes (only pre-existing SearchBar.tsx error unrelated to changes). Build skipped because it requires database connection for generateStaticParams. No Docker config in project. All 3 features implemented and review issues addressed.
